description: Delegated worker prompts that claim execution boundaries must state forbidden paths as well as isolation, no-subagent/Paseo, self-review, and no-merge/push guards.

codex_delegation worker prompt: work only in your isolated worktree branch. Do not use subagents, do not use Paseo, and do not create nested delegation. Run a final self-review. Do not merge and do not push. The prompt lists allowed paths but provides no disallowed-path list.
